title: Fluger New totem
description: This texture pack will replace the totem model with a model of YouTuber Fluger New.
body:
This texture pack will replace the totem model with a model of YouTuber Fuger New.
When the totem is used, it makes the sound "haaaa injustice!" in Russian.


With this texture pack, every type of PvP is easier to master!
Have a good time with this texture pack!
